data.body: PROMPT-ENG round 2 (5 user points). (1) 2026 research (subagent): REINFORCES no-persona (Hu 2026 Expert-Personas-Damage-Accuracy MMLU 71.6->66-68; Luz de Araujo 2025 Principled Personas) — caveat: agentic-review persona case UNTESTED. Evidence-backed agent-review levers folded into 6f2d: plan-before-judge (EvalPlanner), evidence-anchored locked rubrics (Rulers QWK .73 vs .43 — validates our design), skeptic/kill + cross-family + unanimity-as-warning (Refute-or-Promote), tool-grounded validation (Verify-Before-You-Fix/AgenticSCR); multi-agent debate weak. (2) CONFIRMED+IMPLEMENTED Pass-2 = single aggregate verifier over all findings on NON-FRONTIER model (Sonnet) — was per-finding fan-out; one call now verifies all (smoke: 8 findings, 1 call). (3) Reason-first CORRECTED: means reason before structured VERDICT, not no-tool-calls; info-gathering tool use legitimately precedes analysis. (4) FP framing fixed pink-elephant-safe (affirmative: report only grounded findings / read charitably, not do-NOT-fabricate). (5) Volume!=quality: zero findings is a valid/best result, framed affirmatively. Epic 6f2d check-ac 14 / clarity 7. Committed.
